mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_member (member_id, member_pw, member_name, member_email, reg_date) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{memberPw}, #{memberName}, #{memberEmail}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT member_id as memberId , member_pw as memberPw , member_name as memberName , member_email as memberEmail , reg_date as regDate FROM t_member WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND member_pw = #{memberPw}
SELECT member_id as memberId , member_name as memberName , member_email as memberEmail , reg_date as regDate FROM t_member WHERE member_email = #{memberEmail}
SELECT member_id as memberId , member_name as memberName , member_email as memberEmail , face_descriptor as faceDescriptor FROM t_member WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT member_id as memberId , member_name as memberName , face_descriptor as faceDescriptor FROM t_member WHERE face_descriptor IS NOT NULL
